events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a flanged joint that appears to comply with requirements: all 8 studs installed, hardened washers, witness lines, proper thread projection (1-3 threads), correct gasket type, proper torque sequence (star pattern, 3 passes). This looks like a pass.
